title: Bi-Curious George: Snail Trail
full_description: Meet George. He has a soft belly and a tendency to hide in his shell when he’s overwhelmed. Lots of you think he’s a pest. You think he’s disgusting and that he ruins your garden. But we could all learn a thing or two from George. Bi-Curious George (Queer Planet) returns with a slimy exploration of trans-masculinity, hormones and being a pest. Celebrate sensuality, rotting and renewal in this drag-comedy that offers queer alternatives for anyone with a body.
